PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Jocelyn Hunter (Executor).

Mr. Gross stated that there are no objections, that he has been in communication with the family and that they are fine with the arrangements that have been made. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
